
### shared secrets impractical  {.smaller}


* problem: shared secrets usually aren't practical 
<hr class="vspace" />
* [need secure communication before I can do secure communication?]{.fragment fragment-index=2 .custom .myem-only}
* [scaling problems]{.fragment fragment-index=3 .custom .myem-only}  

   * millions of websites $\times$ billions of browsers = how many keys?
   * hard to talk to new people



### alternative encryption scheme  {.smaller}


* want to avoid needing to pre-share secret keys 
<hr class="vspace" />
* but, ok making some sacrifices:
* [confidentiality in only one direction]{.fragment fragment-index=2 .custom .myem-only} 

   * e.g., one set of keys only enables secure communication from A $\rightarrow$ B

* [slower performance]{.fragment fragment-index=3 .custom .myem-only}  

   * encryption and decryption can take longer than symmetric encryption
